features.description: As a user, I want to be able to order a product so that I can receive the confirm.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the product page, when I click 'Order Now', then I should see a confirmation message.
test_steps: Navigate to the product page order
Verify: confirmation message appears within 2 seconds

features.description: When user click 'Cancel Order' button, the order should be canceled and the status should update to 'Canceled'.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have placed an order, when I click 'Cancel Order' button, then the order should be canceled and the status should update to 'Canceled'
Each order entry shows product name, order date, and status
test_steps: Navigate to the order history page
Verify: the order is listed with status 'Pending'
Verify: the order status is updated to 'Canceled'
Verify: status update appears within 2 seconds
Verify: each order entry shows product name, order date, and status
